title: podman ps is not sorted by date
body:
<!--
---------------------------------------------------
BUG REPORT INFORMATION
---------------------------------------------------
Use the commands below to provide key information from your environment:
You do NOT have to include this information if this is a FEATURE REQUEST
-->

**Is this a BUG REPORT or FEATURE REQUEST?**:

> Uncomment only one, leave it on its own line:
>
/kind bug

podman ps and podman ps -a should sort the list of containers to show the newest container at the top and the oldest at the bottom.
It should also show the date in a more human understandable format.

Probably need to similarly sort images.
>
> /kind feature

comments.body: Under the old SQLite data store, we could trivially make the guarantee that containers retrieved from the database were ordered by date with an `ORDER BY`. We did not preserve this guarantee when we moved to boltdb, for simplicity and performance. We should rewrite the output logic to do this ordering (the output logic really needs a rewrite anyways).
ill take a crack at this
